title: Didn’t change strategy  changed environment
author: Ok_Beginning_8126
selftext:
\+388% in 3 months  but honestly it didn’t feel like it while trading

Most of these gains came from setups that looked boring at first not the obvious hype moves

What actually changed for me stopped chasing waited for structure (pullback → hold → continuation) defined risk before entry

The chart looks smooth now,  
but real-time it was full of hesitation and doubt

That’s the part I used to mess up

Lately been going over these trades with a few othersand it’s been way easier to stay consistent vs trading alone

replies.author: Ok_Beginning_8126
replies.body: Nothing fancy, just sharing levels, risk, and entries. Way easier to stay disciplined when others see your plan

comments.author: Ok_Beginning_8126
comments.body: Been going over these setups with a small group lately  helped a lot with consistency. If you're serious about trading, happy to connect.
